name: The Short Sleeve Jack in Light Blue Floral
description: The Short Sleeve Jack in Light Blue Floral from Taylor Stitch 4.5-oz. 55% linen, 45% organic cotton. Custom print designed by Jimmy Thompson. Tailored fit with higher armholes to prevent bunching and increase range of motion. Shorter length to be worn untucked. Washed for a soft, lived-in feel. Sleeve length measures 9" from the shoulder. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Features our signature Jack button-down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Double-needle felled construction. Lock-stitched buttons and buttonholes. Wash cold and lay flat to dry. Made in China.

name: The Shackleton Hoodie in Russet
description: The Shackleton Hoodie in Russet from Taylor Stitch 11-oz. 100% organic cotton French terry body. 12-oz. 52% upcycled cotton, 48% recycled polyester waffle hood. 98% organic cotton, 2% spandex rib. Rib featured at bottom opening, cuff opening, side panels, and pocketing opening. Lower kangaroo patch pocket. Two enamel snaps on hood. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'1", wearing a Medium.

name: The Short Sleeve Jack in Mini Indigo Waffle
description: The Short Sleeve Jack in Mini Indigo Waffle from Taylor Stitch. 4-oz. 100% BCI Cotton. Garment washed for soft hand-feel as well as bringing out the amazing waffle texture. Features our signature Jack button down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Double needle felled construction. Sleeve measures 9" from shoulder. Dark horn buttons. Lock Stitched buttons and buttonholes. Tailored fit and high armhole. Shorter length to be worn untucked. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Cotton Hemp Tee in Copper
description: The Cotton Hemp Tee in Copper from Taylor Stitch 4-oz. 70% organic cotton, 30% hemp. Garment-washed for a soft hand feel. Fully taped shoulder seam. Tailored fit, please size up for a looser fit. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold, tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'2", wearing a Medium.

name: The Camp Short in Ash
description: 12-oz. cotton duck canvas. Tailored construction; size up for a relaxed fit. Flat front shorts with back patch pockets. Slightly tailored fit. Custom copper YKK top shank and brass zipper. Bar tacked at all stress points. Custom San Francisco map pocketing. 8" inseam. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold & tumble dry low Made in California.

name: The Embroidered Hawthorne in Sea Glass Hemp
description: The Embroidered Hawthorne in Sea Glass Hemp from Taylor Stitch 5-oz. 100% hemp. Custom embroidered graphic designed by Real Fun Wow! Garment dyed. Camp collar (no collar stand) meant to be worn open. Clean front placket. Double-needle felled construction. Single rounded chest pocket. Lock-stitched buttons and buttonholes. Sleeve length measures 9" from shoulder. Tea stained buttons. Tailored fit and high armhole. Shorter length to be worn untucked. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. True to size. Buy your normal TS size. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'1", wearing a Medium.

name: The Rugby Shirt in Faded Black Stripe
description: The Rugby Shirt in Faded Black Stripe from Taylor Stitch 12-oz. 100% organic cotton knit jersey body. 8-oz. 100% organic cotton twill collar. 13.5-oz. 100% organic cotton rib cuff. Washed for a soft, lived-in feel. Three-button half-packet with collar stand. Rubber rugby buttons. Natural twill tape detailing on neck. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Ball Cap in '68 Denim
description: Ball Cap in '68 Denim by Taylor Stitch 13-oz. 100% organic cotton. Classic 6-panel hat. Underside of brim, and interior twill tape binding made in classic Taylor Stitch Navy. Back closure features natural leather strap. Antique brass buckle closure. Made in China.

name: The Short Sleeve Jack in Indigo Star
description: Our staple shirt has a tailored fit with a triple button collar. Now our oxford is available in short sleeves with an Indigo Star print. Shop In-Stock now. Proudly made in California. Soft casual button down collar. Tailored fit & high armhole. Stays tucked & looks great untucked. Single needle construction with French seams. Double stitched buttons & button holes. Genuine horn buttons. No pleats for easy ironing & clean lines. Pre shrunk.

name: The Botanical Dye Tee in Moss
description: The Botanical Dye Tee in Moss from Taylor Stitch 8-oz. 52% up-cycled cotton, 48% recycled polyester. Botanical dyed and garment washed for a soft lived in look and feel. Single chest pocket. Fully taped shoulder seam. Tailored fit, please size up for a looser fit. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold, tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Able Jacket in Morel Quilted Nylon
description: The Able Jacket in Morel Quilted Nylon from Taylor Stitch Shell: 1.5-oz. 100% recycled nylon. Lining: 1.5-oz. 100% recycled nylon. Durable Water Repellent (DWR) finish. 100% recycled polyester fill. Vertical quilted construction. Two lower patch pockets. Heavy-duty ribbing at neck and cuff opening. YKK two-way separating zipper Inside zip pocket at chest height. Made in China. Machine wash cold and hang to dry. Model is 6'1", wearing a Medium.

name: The Camp Pant in Navy Jaspe
description: The Camp Pant in Navy Jaspe from Taylor Stitch 10-oz. 100% organic cotton. 5-oz. 100% organic cotton, custom SF map print pocketing. Same beloved fit as our Chore Pant. Washed for a soft lived in feel. Angled front slash pockets for easy entry. Two back mitered patch pockets. Front and back pockets bar-tacked at stress points.. YKK top button and button fly closure. Double needle stitching throughout. 34" inseam. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Division Shirt in Black Indigo Check
description: The Division Shirt in Black Indigo Check from Taylor Stitch 12-oz. 100% organic cotton sashiko. Indigo yarns will wash and fade beautifully over time. Two mitered chest pockets with button through flaps. Left pocket features a pen sleeve. Mitered cuff. Double-needle felled construction. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Camp Short in Cedar Boss Duck
description: The Camp Short in Cedar Boss Duck from Taylor Stitch 12-oz. 54% hemp, 30% recycled polyester, 14% organic cotton, 2% spandex. Custom developed specially for Taylor Stitch. Light stone wash for broken-in feel. Angled front slash pockets for easy entry. Two back mitered patch pockets. Front and back pockets bar-tacked at stress points. YKK top button and button fly closure. Double-needle stitching throughout. 8" inseam. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 5'10", wearing a size 30.

name: The Tommie Short in Faded Black Broken Twill
description: The Tommie Short in Faded Black Broken Twill from Taylor Stitch 8.5-oz. 100% organic cotton broken twill. 6-oz. 100% organic cotton SF map pocketing. Garment dyed and stone washed for a lived in look and feel. Two front slot seam pockets. Two pleated cargo pockets with hidden button closure. Two back welt pockets with flap closure. YKK zipper fly with top button closure. Double-needle felled construction Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Fisherman Beanie in Heather Army
description: The Fisherman Beanie in Heather Army from Taylor Stitch 100% superfine lambswool. 1.5 gauge yarns. Moss stitch construction. 1x1 rib at bottom opening with racking stitch detail on edge. Hand wash cold and lay flat to dry. Made in Vietnam.

name: The Organic Cotton Tee in Vintage White
description: The Organic Cotton Tee in Vintage White from Taylor Stitch 5-oz. 100% organic cotton. Rib on neck opening. Fully taped shoulder seam. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold, tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Apres Short in Tradewinds Micro Cord
description: The Apres Short in Tradewinds Micro Cord from Taylor Stitch 6-oz. 100% organic cotton. Garment dyed and washed. Two front slash front pockets. Two back patch button-through pockets. Custom SF map print pocketing, made with 100% organic cotton. Elastic waist dyed to match drawcord with tin tips. Dyed to match four hole buttons. Button fly. 6" inseam. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'1", wearing a Medium.

name: The Organic Cotton Henley in Rinsed Indigo Stripe
description: The Organic Cotton Henley in Rinsed Indigo Stripe from Taylor Stitch 5.5-oz. 100% organic cotton. Rib on neck opening and cuffs. Fully taped shoulder seam. Indigo yarns will wash and fade beautifully over time. Two-button placket. Charcoal buttons. Tailored fit—please size up for a looser fit. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'2", wearing a Medium.

name: The Heavy Bag Waffle Henley in Olive
description: The Heavy Bag Waffle Henley in Olive from Taylor Stitch 14-oz. 52% Upcycled Cotton, 48% Recycled Polyester. Custom developed thermal based off our favorite vintage "seed stitch" thermals. Ribbed neckline and arm opening. Tailored fit, please size up for looser fit. Pre-shrunk Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 5'10", wearing a Medium.

name: The Heavy Bag Tee in Smoked Olive
description: The Heavy Bag Tee In Smoked Olive from Taylor Stitch 8-oz. 60% upcycled cotton, 40% recycled polyester. A tailored cut, fitted around the shoulders and chest. Garment-dyed and washed for a soft, lived-in look and feel. Single chest pocket. Fully taped shoulder seam. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold, tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'3", wearing a Medium.

name: The Conrad Shirt in Fatigue Olive Dobby Stripe
description: The Conrad Shirt in Fatigue Olive Dobby Stripe from Taylor Stitch 5-oz. 100% organic cotton dobby. Washed for a soft, lived in feel. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Camp collar (no collar stand) meant to be worn open. Two rounded chest pockets. Straight hem with vents at side seams. Double-needle felled construction. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Taylor Stitch x Hypeadelic Cap v2.44
description: The Taylor Stitch x Hypeadelic Cap v2.44 from Taylor Stitch Each handmade by Dave Latina of Hypeadelic, using upcycled materials from archival Taylor Stitch garments. Each cap in this collection is a one-of-a-kind design and is individually numbered. Leather slide adjustment on back. Spot clean only. Made in the USA.

name: The Slim Chino in Navy
description: Simple, slim, and classic flat front chinos, these pants are the most comfortable and hardest wearing Chinos out there. Now in Navy. Shop Essentials Simple, clean and classic flat front chinos. Tailored throughout the leg with enough room to get your hands in your pockets. They are just the right amount of slim. Custom YKK shank and brass zipper. Custom printed San Francisco vintage map pocketing. Brushed fabric for perfect softness. Mercerized yarns for durability. 36" inseam to satisfy almost any height. Pre shrunk. Proudly handmade in Spain.

name: The Standard Belt in Black
description: The Standard Belt in Black from Taylor Stitch We recommend getting one size up from your pant size. Proudly made in the USA. 8-10 oz. heritage leather. Tanned by The Horween Tannery in Chicago, Illinois. 1.5” wide. Solid brass buckle and rivets.

name: The Minimalist Billfold in Graphite
description: 100% full-grain Spanish cowhide. Hidden card slot liner to minimize bulk and stretch. Slim profile design. Steel leather with tan leather lining. 4" folded width x 3.5" folded height. Hand painted edges. Six card slots. One interior cash slot. Made in Spain.

name: The Fireside Scarf in Highland Navy Plaid
description: The Fireside Scarf in Highland Navy Plaid from Taylor Stitch Developed and woven by Abraham Moon & Sons woollen mills. 100% merino wool. Dry clean only. Made in Great Britain.

name: The Jack in Spruce Houndstooth Check
description: The Jack in Spruce Houndstooth Check from Taylor Stitch 5-oz. 100% organic cotton. Garment washed for soft hand-feel. Features our signature Jack button down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Rounded cuffs. Dark horn buttons. Double-needle felled construction throughout. Double lock-stitched buttons and button holes. Tailored fit and high armhole. Perfect length to tuck or untuck. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'1", wearing a Medium.

name: The Jack in Olive Brushed Organic Cotton
description: The Jack in Olive Brushed Organic Cotton from Taylor Stitch. 5.5-oz. 100% organic cotton Lightly brushed for a soft hand-feel. Our signature Jack button down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Dark horn buttons. Lock Stitched buttons and buttonholes. Double needle felled construction throughout. Shorter length to be worn untucked. Tailored fit and high armhole. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Myles Momentum Short in Fog
description: Lightweight 85% Nylon / 15% Spandex Four-Way Stretch Durable Water Repellant Treatment Bounce-Proof Backward Set Pockets Hidden Zippers Headphone Port Custom Interior Drawstring

name: The Heavy Bag Waffle Henley in Cardinal
description: The Heavy Bag Waffle Henley in Cardinal from Taylor Stitch. 11-oz. 52% Upcycled Cotton, 48% Recycled Polyester. Classic waffle knit construction. Half placket, three button front. Features ribbing at the neckline and cuffs. Fully taped shoulder seam. Cat's eye buttons. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in Mexico.

name: The Rib Beanie in Oat Heather
description: The Rib Beanie in Oat Heather from Taylor Stitch 100% baby yak wool. Responsible fiber that comes from the downy undercoat of Yaks, which naturally sheds every year. One size fits most. 18" circumference, 10.25" height. 3x2 rib throughout. Hand wash cold and lay flat to dry. Made in China.

name: The Jack in Olive Pin Dot
description: The Jack in Olive Pin Dot from Taylor Stitch. 6-oz. 100% organic cotton. Features our signature Jack button-down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Double stitched buttons and buttonholes. Rounded cuffs. Dark horn buttons. Complete double-needle felled construction throughout. Fits true to size. Tailored fit and high armhole. Perfect length to tuck or untuck. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Short Sleeve Western in Natural Herringbone
description: The Short Sleeve Western in Natural Herringbone from Taylor Stitch. 5.5-oz. 85% Organic Cotton, 15% Linen. Light rinse for a soft feel. Two slanted snap chest pockets, inspired by our favorite vintage western shirts. Western-style front and back yokes. Sleeve measures 9" from shoulder. Bar-tack reinforcement on top of the pocket flap, top pocket corners, and side gusset. Solid antique brass concho button. Genuine YKK western snaps with an antique brass setting. Double-needle chainstitch fell at side seam and single needle French fell at arm-hole. Tonal stitching. Tailored fit and high armhole. Perfect length to tuck or untuck. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

description: The Tree Skipper is a better version of the boat shoe, made with lightweight and breathable eucalyptus fiber. Designed for everyday casual wear and perfect for warmer weather.

name: Men's Dasher NZ - Medium Grey (Light Grey Sole)
description: A new take on our fan-favorite Dasher, made for busy days and spontaneous plans. Lightweight, breathable comfort keeps you cool as you move, with added heel protection where it counts. Fast when you want. Comfortable always.

name: Women's Golf Dashers - Natural Black/Dark Grey (Blizzard Sole)
description: Roomy forefoot meets full-swing stability in our nature-made golf shoe. This lightweight style seamlessly transitions from course to post-round drinks and can help you get through any drizzles (or sandtraps) that come your way.

name: Women's Runner NZ Tweed - Dark Grey (Stormy Grey Sole)
description: Part of our Winter Materials Edit, the Runner NZ Tweed combines timeless texture and iconic Allbirds comfort. With its tailored styling and seasonal charm, it’s the perfect way to add a touch of refinement to your everyday look.

name: Men's Wool Dasher Mizzle - Stony Cream (Natural White Sole)
description: The Wool Dasher Mizzle is a running shoe that uses natural materials to give you extra grip and keep your feet cozy and dry on cold, wet runs.

name: Women's Soft Merino Long Sleeve Tee - Medium Grey
description: An ultra smooth active tee designed to go with the flow, whether that’s a jog turned coffee run or vice versa. Natural materials like Tencel™ Lyocell and merino wool help keep you comfy while you’re on the move.

name: Women's Tree Glider - Deep Navy (Blizzard Sole)
description: Whether it’s workouts or hangouts, the Tree Glider has every phase of your day covered. Inspired by effortless ease, this elevated active style brings flow everywhere you go.

name: Women's Breezer Point - Warm White (Natural Black Sole)
description: A softly pointed toe and slightly raised heel sharpen up our fan-favorite women’s flat—just enough polish, no extra fuss. Light, airy, and easy to wear, this is the flat that pulls an outfit together without trying too hard.

name: Recycled Belt Bag - Rugged Beige
description: Whether you’re out with friends on a Saturday night or exploring new destinations, our Recycled Belt Bag helps keep your essentials conveniently contained while on the go.

name: Men's Golf Dasher - Blizzard/Burnt Olive (Medium Gum Sole)
description: Roomy forefoot meets full-swing stability in our nature-made golf shoe. This lightweight style seamlessly transitions from course to post-round drinks and can help you get through any drizzles (or sandtraps) that come your way.

name: Men's Cruiser - Blizzard (Blizzard Sole)
description: Inspired by a classic court style, this signature shoe delivers the right balance of style and comfort. Its lightweight build and supple softness make this your new pick for life on the go.

name: Women's Strider Explore - Hazy Burgundy (Weathered Brown Sole)
description: From exploring urban landscapes to tackling the trails (or both), this active shoe is here for it all. Extra-grippy lug soles, reinforced organic cotton uppers, and dual density foam insoles will keep you moving-confidently and comfortably.

name: Women's Dasher NZ Relay - Mushroom (Natural White Sole)
description: All the breezy comfort of the redesigned Dasher NZ—now in an easy slip-on. Dasher NZ Relay blends bold, modern design with easy on/easy off wearability, so it’s comfortable the second you step in and effortless to wear all day.

name: Men's Wool Runner NZ Waterproof - Dark Grey (Light Grey Sole)
description: Boot-like protection, sneaker-like performance. Weather any storm with our fully waterproof Wool Runner NZ built to keep water out and warmth in. Rainy days just got a lot brighter.

name: Men's Allbirds Slide - Spice
description: Easy on. Easy off. All summer long. These supportive, laid-back slides pair a relaxed look with iconic Allbirds comfort, making them an easy choice for warm days and wherever they take you. Bright colors included.

name: Men's Wool Dasher Mizzle - Rugged Beige (Stony Cream Sole)
description: The Wool Dasher Mizzle is a running shoe that uses natural materials to give you extra grip and keep your feet cozy and dry on cold, wet runs.

name: Women's Wool Cruiser Waterproof - Royal Blue/Natural Black (Barely Grey Sole)
description: Cruise into stormy season in style. Our sleek new low-profile sneaker features a waterproof Merino wool blend upper, plus a wrap-around natural rubber blend outsole and one-piece tongue design to help keep water where it belongs (outside of course).

name: Men's Cruiser Slip On - Natural Black (Blizzard Sole)
description: Slip-on ease meets everyday style. Cruiser Slip On pairs a clean, minimalist look with a breathable tree knit upper for comfort you'll notice right away. Easy to wear, easy to style, and comfortable enough for pretty much anywhere the day takes you.

name: Women's Tree Runner NZ - Spice (Warm White Sole)
description: The latest iteration of our fan-fave Tree Runner, the Tree Runner NZ nods to our New Zealand roots, tying ten years of innovation together in a shoe as stylish as it is comfortable. Designed with all day wear in mind, it's the ultimate travel companion.

name: Women's Cruiser Tweed - Weathered Brown (Weathered White Sole)
description: Part of our Winter Materials Edit, the Cruiser Tweed brings some seasonal texture to the everyday versatility of our classic Cruiser. Warm, refined, and wildly comfortable, these are shoes made to feel as good as you look in them.

name: Women's Lounger Lift - Blizzard (Blizzard Sole)
description: With an elevated sole and versatile canvas material, this modern slip-on raises the bar for easy wearability and styling.

name: Women's Cruiser Terralux™ - Toasted Coconut (Medium Gum Sole)
description: Crafted using bio-fabrication, the Cruiser Terralux™ delivers iconic Allbirds comfort in our most refined silhouette yet—proof that comfort doesn’t have to be casual.

name: Women's Tree Runner Go - Utility - Natural Black (Natural Black Sole)
description: With tough tread, protective overlays, and stretchy no-lace laces, these explore-ready sneakers make it easier than ever to get outside.

name: Women's Lounger Lift Velvet - Sienna Blush (Blizzard Sole)
description: Part of our Winter Materials Edit, the Lounger Lift Velvet lends some casual luxury to any outfit. Sophisticated, subtle, and supremely soft, this is the seasonal look you’ve been looking for.

name: Women's Dasher NZ - Natural Black (Blizzard Sole)
description: A new take on our fan-favorite Dasher, made for busy days and spontaneous plans. Lightweight, breathable comfort keeps you cool as you move, with added heel protection where it counts. Fast when you want. Comfortable always.

name: Women's Wool Strider - Dark Navy (Blizzard Sole)
description: For cooler days on the go, these workout-to-hangout wonders are hard to beat. A soft, temperature-regulating Merino wool blend upper keeps feet pleasantly cozy while our plush, bouncy soles bring unrivaled underfoot comfort.

name: Anytime No Show Heel Grip Sock - Natural Grey Heather
description: This updated version of our No Show Sock features a silicone heel grip to make sure it stays right where you want it. Perfect for everyday wear, working out, staying hidden, and pairing with your favorite Allbirds.

name: Men's Wool Runner NZ - Luxe Gold (Stony Cream Sole)
description: Rethinking a classic isn’t easy, but breaking new ground rarely is. The Wool Runner NZ manages both, combining the original Wool Runner’s DNA with next-level comfort and more refined styling, while nodding to our New Zealand roots.

name: Anytime Crew Sock - Blizzard, Natural Grey Heather (Light Grey Sole)
description: Light, breathable and made to move and groove without budging. These are socks you’ll never want to take off.

name: USB-C Clamp Hub for 24-inch iMac
description: Designed to fit the 2021 iMac (24-inch), the Satechi USB-C Clamp Hub provides convenient access for all your most-loved ports and peripherals. Featuring an USB-C data port, three USB-A 3.0 data ports, micro/SD card readers, and sleek aluminum design, the USB-C Clamp Hub upgrades your iMac’s functionality while maintaining its modern aesthetic.

name: Slim X2 Bluetooth Backlit Keyboard
description: Complete your modern home or office workspace with the Satechi Slim X2 Bluetooth Backlit Keyboard. Designed for Mac & iOS devices, the X2 Keyboard features a QWERTY layout with numeric keypad, multi-device Bluetooth, and shortcut keys optimized for Apple devices – with a modern, ultra-slim design. Equipped with adjustable backlit keys and a rechargeable USB-C port, the keyboard allows you to work with ease wherever you are.

name: USB-C To HDMI 2.1 8K Adapter
description: The Satechi USB-C to HDMI 2.1 8K Adapter outputs the display of your USB-C device to your external monitor using the latest HDMI 2.1 technology, including 4K/120Hz and 8K/60Hz video for ultra-high resolution and refresh rate. The USB-C to HDMI 2.1 8K Adapter features a sleek aluminum enclosure, a tangle-free braided cable, and a reinforced neck for optimum durability.

name: Qi2 Wireless Car Charger
description: Charge your phone on the go with the Satechi Qi2 Wireless Car Charger. Driven by the latest fast charging technology, it delivers 15W of power for a fast, efficient charge.

name: Slim W1 Wired Backlit Keyboard
description: The Slim W1 Wired Backlit Keyboard is your modern, compact solution to upgrading your Mac setup. Featuring a full QWERTY layout, convenient function keys, and adjustable backlit keys – all with a hassle-free, wired connection. Equipped with a built-in USB-C cable, the Slim W1 Wired Backlit Keyboard easily connects to your Type-C device for instant installation with no extra setup required.

name: Dual Sided 2-in-1 USB-C Charger for Apple Watch and Airpods
description: Satechi’s USB-C Watch AirPods Charger combines the power of wireless charging for Apple Watch and compatible AirPods into one, palm-sized device. Simply plug the charger into any powered USB-C port, like a MacBook or iPad, with the desired charging side face-up and place the respective accessory right on top for plug-and-play power

name: Aluminum 2-in-1 Magnetic Wireless Charging Stand
description: The Satechi Magnetic 2-in-1 Wireless Charging Stand combines the power of dual wireless charging with the convenience of hands-free magnetic attachment. Designed for iPhone 12/13 and AirPods Pro, the Stand features a built-in magnetic charger and a designated wireless charging pad to power both devices with ease.

name: Mobile XR Hub with microSD Reader
description: Elevate your XR experience with pro-level charging and seamless compatibility with Viture , Xreal , and Rokid . Enjoy 4K visuals, lightning-fast data transfer, and easy storage with the built-in microSD reader. Perfect for gaming or productivity on the go, this sleek, durable hub delivers next-gen performance in a pocket-sized design. ***microSD card not included.

name: Right-Angle USB-C to USB-C Data and Charge Cable (1m)
description: Introducing your new go-to solution for effortless power and seamless connectivity. Enjoy powerful charging, lightning-fast data transfers, and crystal-clear streaming with up to 240W of power delivery, 20Gbps transfer speeds, and 4K/60Hz video output. T he Right-Angle USB-C Data & Charge Cable (1m) features a durable braided cable with a reinforced neck, aluminum USB-C connectors, and vegan leather cable management to keep your workspace clutter-free while promoting sustainability. Crafted with comfort and efficiency in mind, i ts ergonomic right-angle design significantly reduces strain on both the cable and your device's USB-C port, so no more worrying about bending or fraying, even in tight spaces.

name: Vegan-Leather FindAll™ Luggage Tag
description: Introducing the Vegan-Leather FindAll ™ Luggage Tag, a sophisticated and practical travel essential for the modern explorer . Made from premium materials, this sleek and durable accessory keeps your luggage secure and easily locatable while complementing your travel style. With built-in Apple Find My technology, the luggage tag helps you locate misplaced belongings in seconds, alerts you if you’ve left something behind, and guides you with step-by-step directions on your Apple device. Its wirelessly rechargeable battery ensures long-lasting performance, while advanced Bluetooth 5.4 LE technology delivers fast, reliable tracking.

name: USB-C NVMe and SATA SSD Enclosure
description: Tool-free NVMe SSD enclosur e can easily connect a M.2 NMVe SSDs or M.2 SATA SSDs with your computer to expand storage, upgrade the system, back up files, retrieve and recover data, and transfer data. Plug and play, no driver needed. USB 3.1 gen 2 cable included. *SSD not included

name: 100W USB-C PD Compact GaN Charger
description: Upgrade to next-gen charging with the Satechi 100W USB-C PD Compact GaN Charger, featuring powerful Gallium nitride (GaN) technology for a noticeably faster, more efficient charge. Equipped with dual USB-C PD ports and a USB-A port, the charger consolidates three adapters and intelligently adjusts its power output according to its connected devices – up to 100W.

name: Slim X1 Bluetooth Backlit Keyboard
description: All the features you love in our most compact keyboard yet. Upgrade your on-the-go setup with the Satechi Slim X1 Bluetooth Backlit Keyboard. Designed with Apple users in mind, the keyboard features a full QWERTY layout, multi-device Bluetooth connection, and macOS function keys – all with a smaller, more compact size. The perfect accessory to pack for work on the go wherever creativity takes you. It is equipped with backlit keys and a convenient rechargeable USB-C port.

name: Type-C 2-in-1 USB Hub with Ethernet
description: The Satechi Type-C 2-in-1 USB 3.0 Aluminum 3 Port Hub and Ethernet Port is a high-speed network solution for laptop or desktop users. It enables you to connect directly to your network via USB port, eliminating the hassle of disassembling your computer. The adapter allows you to instantly connect to a 10/100/1000 Mbps network from an available USB port on your computer

name: Bluetooth Media Button
description: The Satechi BT Media Button puts media control at your fingertips with a single press of a button. Attach the button to your steering wheel or dashboard to safely and conveniently to control multi-media functions even when your smartphone is out of reach. Play/pause, forward/backtrack, and adjust volume even while your phone is in your pocket, purse, plugged into the wall, or elsewhere up to 40 feet away!

name: 100W USB-C PD Wall Charger
description: Unlock the full potential of USB-C Power Delivery with the Satechi 100W USB-C PD Wall Charger, featuring next-gen Gallium Nitride (GaN) technology to provide a faster, more efficient charge than before. With up to 100W output, the charger keeps up with even your most intensive tasks with a convenient foldable plug that makes it easy to take with you, wherever you need a powerful charge.

name: ReadMate LED Desktop Magnifier
description: Use the Satechi ReadMate LED Desktop Magnifier to read text, review photos, and look at objects at five times magnification. The three LED lights provide bright light for a thorough inspection. Easily move the magnifier across a flat surface with one hand or hold it up to an object for close observation.

name: 30W Dual-Port Wall Charger
description: The Satechi 30W Dual-Port Wall Charger is your on-the-go charging solution for USB-C tablets and smartphones. Featuring a USB-C PD port (max 18W) to charge your power-hungry USB-C tablets or fast-charge your compatible smartphones and a USB 3.0 port (max 12W) for your other USB-A devices

name: 2-in-1 Foldable Qi2 Wireless Charging Stand
description: Keep your everyday essentials charged and organized with the Satechi 2-in-1 Foldable Qi2 Wireless Charging Stand. Driven by the latest Qi2 technology, it can simultaneously deliver 1 5 W of power to your iPhone and 5W of power to your AirPods . Its foldable, travel-friendly design features a premium-grade aluminum enclosure, a vegan - leather base, a soft silicone charging puck, and sturdy, durable hinges that won’t weaken over time , enabling optimal viewing in both portrait and landscape mode.

name: 4-Port USB-C Hub with Power Delivery
description: Upgrade your setup with the 4-Port USB-C Hub with Power Delivery. This sleek hub boasts 100W USB-C PD charging and four USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 ports, seamlessly combining four ports into one compact device.

name: Thunderbolt 5 Pro Cable
description: Built for next-generation performance, the Thunderbolt 5 Pro Cable delivers uncompromising speed, power, and display support - through a single, thoughtfully designed connection. Crafted for demanding workflows and built to last, it's the foundation of a cleaner, more capable setup. Official certification ensures reliability, interoperability, and full next-gen bandwidth. Premium braid, reinforced strain relief, and aluminum housing for lasting flexibility. 120 Gb/s uni-directional / 80Gb/s bi-directional throughput. Transfer large videos, 3D, and gaming files at professional speed. Up to 240W Power Delivery to keep high-performance laptops powered through intensive sessions. Dual 8K@60Hz or Triple 4K@144Hz Support. Visuals stay sharp and fluid; up to 6k on macOS.

name: 4-In-1 USB-C Hub With 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet
description: Seamless Speed. Supreme Connectivity. Double the performance of traditional Gigabit Ethernet with the Satechi USB-C 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet Adapter for faster network speeds, quicker file transfers, and Ethernet pass-through capability on PCs.

name: Type-C Multi-Port Adapter 4K with Ethernet V2
description: We took one of our top-selling customer favorite USB-C adapters and made it even better! Introducing our latest Satechi Aluminum Multi-Port Adapter V2, with all the same peripherals that you loved on the previous multiport adapter but with several changes to ensure a consistent connection and stable data transfer.

name: Trio Wireless Charger With Magnetic Pad
description: The Satechi Trio Wireless Charger With Magnetic Pad simplifies wireless charging with a convenient place for all your devices – so you’ll never be without a charge. With faster-charging technology and intelligent safety features, the Charging Pad quickly powers a Qi-enabled smartphone, Apple Watch, and AirPods Pro all at the same time.

name: Type-C Pro Hub Adapter with Ethernet
description: Ideal for USB C MacBook Pro users, the Satechi Type-C Pro Hub Adapter with Ethernet adds a multitude of expansion ports to your laptop. Featuring a Gigabit Ethernet port, USB-C PD charging, USB-A data ports, and a micro SD card slot to fulfill all your data transfer needs. Dual display not supported on Apple M1 Macs.

name: 7-in-1 USB-C Slim Multiport Adapter with Ethernet
description: Mobilize your workspace with the Satechi 7-in-1 USB-C Slim Multiport Adapter with Ethernet. Its e levated design boasts a sleek aluminum enclosure with a braided cable and a reinforced neck for optimum durability.

name: USB-C to USB-C Cable - 10 Inches
description: Complete your charging setup with the Satechi USB-C to USB-C Cable, featuring a durable design and shorter length to make on-the-go charging even more convenient. Pairs perfectly with our Quatro Wireless Power Bank or 108W Pro Desktop Charger to quickly recharge a Type-C device in your home office or out on-the-go.

name: SM1 Slim Mechanical Backlit Bluetooth Keyboard
description: Introducing the first Satechi wireless m echanica l keyboard designed for both Mac and Windows. This compact keyboard is equally perfect as a gaming keyboard or a keyboard for typing . It features a beautiful white backlight, 14 different backlight patterns, and high-quality tactile switches . In other words, it looks, feels, and sounds like the mechanical keyboard you'v e been waiting for.

name: Type-C Multimedia Adapter
description: Introducing the Satechi Aluminum Type-C Multimedia Adapter with all your favorite legacy ports bundled into 1 sleek, aluminum adapter. Features a USB-C Power Delivery port to charge your PD-compatible devices (up to 60W), 4K HDMI (30Hz), mini DisplayPort - 4K / 30Hz, Gigabit Ethernet, micro/SD card slots and three USB 3.0 ports for access to all your devices.

name: 3-in-1 Foldable Qi2 Wireless Charging Stand
description: Keep your everyday essentials charged and organized with the Satechi 3-in-1 Foldable Qi2 Wireless Charging Stand. Its f oldable, travel-friendly design features a premium-grade aluminum enclosure, a vegan leather base, a soft silicone charging puck, and sturdy, durable hinges that won’t weaken over time , enabling optimal viewing in both portrait and landscape mode.

name: OntheGo™ Bluetooth Mouse
description: The OntheGo ™ Bluetooth Mouse is built for modern professionals and travelers who value styl e and reliab ility in their workspace, no matter wher e the day takes them . With a soft-touch top made from premium materials and seamless multi-device connectivity, it brings together form and function in one sleek, compact package. Whether you’re at a café, airport, or remote office, this mouse keeps up with your workflow—no wires, no hassle.

name: Type-C Multi-Port Adapter 4K with Ethernet
description: The Satechi Type-C Aluminum Multi-Port Adapter adds a plethora of connections to your laptop or desktop, just by using one Type-C port. Add 4K HDMI, pass-through charging, Ethernet, three USB Type-A ports, and SD and Micro SD Card slots to your computer.

name: OntheGo™ Power Bank (5K)
description: Stay powered anywhere with the OntheGo™ Power Bank with Stand.
